Name: Dr. TiqToq
Attack Pattern:
Cycle in order: 
1) Weaken (infinite)
2) 50% attack, 50% block
3) Enrage
4) 125% attack
Special Ability: After every 3rd cycle add one turn to spellcast heal for 35%

Name: Sir Passive-Aggressive
Attack Pattern:
Cycle A in order, two times: 
1) Cast Brainrot 1
2) 50% attack
3) Cast thorns, 75% block

Then Switch to B) 3 attacks in a row: 70%, 80%, 90% (increasing 10% each time)

Then back to A, then B again picking up +10% of the last value (e.g start at 100% the 2nd time). Keep repeating this cycle
